features.name: Portal Core Application
features.description: Next.js 16 monorepo portal with department-based routing, real-time updates, and AI integration
acceptance_criteria: Department pages render with proper context

features.name: API Core Services
features.description: NestJS/Fastify API with Supabase integration, Redis caching, and Inngest background jobs

features.name: Supabase Database Layer
features.description: Shared Supabase client, types, and database migrations with RLS enforcement

features.name: DeepEval Quality Evaluation
features.description: LLM evaluation framework for AI service quality and code-generation compliance
acceptance_criteria: AI service prompts pass hallucination/factual metrics
Code generation follows design system tokens
RLS policies validated by custom metrics
